name: Portuguese Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 pound smoked sausage, cut into halves
1 small cabbage head, cored and chopped into spoon-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop onions and sauté them in oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add sliced smoked sausage to the pot and cook for 4-5 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
3. Add garlic powder (or an equivalent amount of fresh crushed garlic), black pepper, and salt (if using) to the mixture. Stir to combine.
4. Pour in beef stock, catsup, kidney beans, and potatoes. Bring the mixture to a vigorous boil over high heat, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
5. Once boiling, reduce the heat to maintain a simmer for about 30 minutes.
6. Add chopped cabbage and continue to simmer for an additional 30 minutes or so.
7. Stir in apple cider vinegar and allow the soup to simmer for another 15-30 minutes before serving.
